layout_spacing.container_padding: px-4 sm:px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-12 max-w-7xl mx-auto

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border-2 border-[#F3E8FF] rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden shadow-sm
surface_strategies.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 sticky top-0 z-50 border-b-2 border-[#F3E8FF]

motion.hover_button: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#FF6B9E] transition-all duration-200 active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Fredoka' and 'Nunito' fonts from Google Fonts.
This is an e-commerce platform for handmade items (@tp._loveco). The brand must feel colorful, playful, vibrant, and tactile. Do NOT use standard flat corporate SaaS UI.
For primary call-to-action buttons, implement a subtle neo-brutalist style (rounded corners, but sharp colorful drop shadow offset).

Home Page: Use an asymmetric Bento Grid for the category navigation (Hamper, Bouquet, Keychain, Hair Accessories, Plushie, Custom Album, Custom Embroidery). Each grid item should have an image and a label.
Product Listing: Adopt an Amazon-style card layout but heavily stylized for the brand. Image on top (aspect-square, rounded-t-[2rem]), price below in bold primary text, title in body font.
Contact Section: Clearly feature the WhatsApp number (6388533973) and Instagram link (@tp._loveco) using prominent buttons with Lucide React or Phosphor icons.

Admin Panel: Use Shadcn components extensively here. Ensure forms, tables, and product management lists are clean, accessible, and high-contrast. The Admin area can be more subdued (Archetype 4) for usability, but retain brand colors in primary buttons.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.

Hero Section: Use a soft, pastel overlay on the hero image or layout to prevent text from blending in. If using the hero image, apply bg-white/40 or bg-[#FFFDF7]/60 so it feels warm and bright, rather than a dark muddy overlay.
